location.tooltip: Location to an empty folder where it will sync the Google Drive data to e.g. ~/Documents/Drive.

remote.tooltip: The name of your rclone Google Drive remote, without the trailing colon (e.g. gdrive). Run 'rclone listremotes' in a terminal to see your configured remotes.

remoteHelp.description: Enter the rclone remote name configured for Google Drive (run 'rclone listremotes' in a terminal to see your remotes, without the trailing colon e.g. gdrive).

whitelistHelp.description: Note: If you want to sync only specific folders please make sure to add them on the list above. Please enter the names exactly as they are named in your Drive! It is also possible to add subfolders e.g. Documents/Work/Projects.

whitelist.tooltip: Whitelist folders that will be synced from Google Drive e.g. Documents, Photos

rcloneDocs.description: To configure rclone with Google Drive, click the button below to open the official rclone Google Drive documentation.

rcloneDocsButton.tooltip: Opens the rclone Google Drive setup documentation in a browser.

website.description: To learn more about the applet please click the button below to visit the official repository for this applet.

websiteButton.tooltip: Opens GitHub website to learn more about this applet.

helpAbout.description: To learn more about the applet please click the button below to visit the official Cinnamon Spices website for this applet. You can also leave feedback in the comment section below.

helpAboutButton.tooltip: Opens Cinnamon Spices website to learn more about this applet.

helpIssue.description: If you find an issue with this applet please make a report on GitHub by clicking the button below. Please make sure that the issue doesn't already exists

helpSubmitIssue.tooltip: Opens GitHub project page where you can submit a new issue for this applet.
